## 💡 Tips for Choosing the Right Treatment

citations.cited_text: Mature skin shows reduced elasticity and deeper wrinkles. Microneedling becomes more effective in these cases because it stimulates collagen productio...
citations.title: Anti-Aging Facial Treatments That Actually Work - Katy MediSpa

content.text: Mature skin showing reduced elasticity and deeper wrinkles benefits most from microneedling, as it stimulates collagen production within the dermis. In some cases, combining microneedling with mild peels enhances results by addressing both surface texture and deeper structural concerns.

citations.cited_text: Sensitive skin needs a cautious approach. I usually begin with LED therapy or gentle hydrating facials before introducing stronger treatments. Gradual...
citations.title: Anti-Aging Facial Treatments That Actually Work - Katy MediSpa

content.text: Sensitive skin needs a cautious approach — starting with LED therapy or gentle hydrating facials before introducing stronger treatments helps prevent irritation and maintain skin integrity.
